home.title: Reservation system for a cycle track
home.choseTrackTitle: Select the track you want to check the occupancy of:

makeReservations.notAvailable: This track is already booked for the selected time.
makeReservations.available: The track is available at this time.
makeReservations.startDateNotAvailable: The selected start date and time are not available for this track.
makeReservations.endDateNotAvailable: The selected end date and time are not available for this track.
makeReservations.datesError: Start date must be earlier than end date.
makeReservations.availabilityFalse: The track is booked at this time, please choose another time!
